title: MCAD: Complaints of Discrimination — How to File
description: MCAD landing page for filing a discrimination complaint (employment, housing, public accommodations, higher-education admissions, credit, lending). Directs users to the MCAD decision-tree questionnaire that determines available filing methods; representation not required, no cost to file. Links to the case-process guide, motion procedures, and the 300-day deadline page.
notes: As of a March 2026 notice MCAD announced a forthcoming online case-management system and complaint portal. Filing deadline is 300 days from the last discriminatory act (see sub-02-mcad-deadline). May be filed without an attorney.
